title: Rimuru Tempest's Sword
description: This is the Sword from Rimuru Tempest out of the Anime That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime
body:
to get the sword name it : **Rimurus Sword**

this only includs the sword you can get the Mask [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rimuru-mask)

![The Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c429ca86c0882bc53db5ffce87f116f8508eff9a_0.webp)

you will need optifne(forge) or CIT Resewn(fabric) to make it work
